title: elaphoglossum omphalodes
intro: Elaphoglossum omphalodes, also known as the umbilicate elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Elaphoglossum omphalodes can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent.
